  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Album
    JPA entity representing a music album.
    AlbumArtView
    Self-contained JavaFX node that displays album art for the currently playing song, falling back to a musical-note placeholder when no art is available.
    AlbumCardListCell
    A ListCell that renders an Album as a horizontal card row, showing a 60px album art thumbnail on the left and the album title and metadata (song count and release year) stacked on the right.
    AlbumListCell
    A lightweight ListCell that renders an Album as a compact two-line row showing the album title and a summary of its song count and release year.
    AlbumRepository
    Spring Data JPA repository for Album entities.
    AlbumSongCell
    A ListCell used inside the album detail view to display a single Song as a tabular row containing the track number, title, play count, date first listened, and a context-menu trigger button.
    AlbumViewBuilder
    Builds the full album detail view displayed when a user selects an album.
    AllTimeStatsData
    Data transfer object holding pre-computed all-time listening statistics for the dashboard graph info panel.
    AlphabetBar
    A vertical A-Z (plus #) alphabet bar that sits on the right edge of a list view.
    AnalyticsCacheService
    Session-scoped in-memory cache for analytics DoublyLinkedList datasets.
    AnalyticsController
    Top-level controller for the Analytics page.
    AnalyticsPaginatedModal
    Instantiable modal helper that opens a ModalListController overlay on a given StackPane and serves pages from an in-memory DoublyLinkedList.
    AnalyticsRowFactory
    Static factory for analytics row UI components.
    AnalyticsSectionBuilder
    Static builder for standard analytics center-content sections.
    AppUtils
    Shared utility methods and application-wide constants.
    Artist
    JPA entity representing a music artist.
    ArtistDiscographyNavigation
    Centralized service for artist navigation across the application.
    ArtistListeningTimeService
    Computes total listening time per artist from the current user's playback history.
    ArtistListeningTimeService.ArtistTimeData
    Pairs an Artist with their total accumulated listening time in seconds.
    ArtistRepository
    Spring Data JPA repository for Artist entities.
    ArtistViewBuilder
    Builds the artist list view and the artist detail view for the library's Artists screen.
    AuthenticationController
    Top-level controller for the authentication page.
    AuthenticationService
    Handles user registration and authentication.
    CardFactory
    Factory for the dashboard stat cards row.
    ChartData
    Data transfer object carrying the three monthly listening time series (current year, previous year, all-time highest year) needed to render the dashboard line chart and its colour-coded title row.
    ChartViewModel
    Loads and prepares the data series for the dashboard line chart.
    DailyListeningStatsService
    Provides daily and weekly listening statistics for the dashboard stat cards.
    DashboardController
    Top-level controller for the Dashboard page.
    DashboardGraphController
    Assembles the dashboard graph panel and orchestrates data loading.
    DashboardLineChartBuilder
    SRP: Solely responsible for constructing the SmoothLineChart node and its title row.
    DataLoadingService
    Asynchronous data loader backed by a fixed thread pool.
    DoublyLinkedList<T>
    Generic DoublyLinkedList data structure for pagination.
    EmptyStateConfig
    Configuration for empty state UI components.
    Favourite
    JPA entity recording a song that a user has marked as a favourite.
    FavouriteRepository
    Spring Data JPA repository for Favourite entities.
    FavouriteService
    Manages the current user's favourited songs.
    FavouritesViewBuilder
    Builds the Favourites screen, displaying songs the current user has marked as favourites sorted by the date they were added.
    GenericModalLoader
    Combines asynchronous data loading with paginated modal display.
    Genre
    JPA entity representing a music genre.
    GenreFilterService
    GenreFilterService provides filtering logic for songs and albums by genre.
    GenreRepository
    Spring Data JPA repository for Genre entities.
    HistoryRowData
    Display DTO representing a single row in the Listening History view.
    IconFactory
    Factory for loading application icons from the /icons/ resource directory.
    ImportController
    Controller for the Import page.
    ImportService
    Service responsible for orchestrating the music file import process.
    ImportService.TriConsumer<A,B,C>
    A functional interface for callbacks that accept three arguments.
    JavaFxApplication
    JavaFX Application entry point.
    LibraryHandler
    A lightweight context record that bundles the core services and callbacks required by the library view layer.
    LibraryService
    Thin facade for song, album, and artist retrieval.
    ListeningHistoryService
    Service for managing user listening history with pagination support.
    ListeningHistoryViewModel
    Loads paginated listening history rows for the Analytics page.
    ListeningPaginationService
    Pagination service for analytics listings (songs, artists, albums).
    LoginAttemptService
    Tracks failed login attempts per username and enforces escalating lockout periods to protect against brute force attacks.
    MainController
    Static navigation hub for the application.
    ModalListController
    Standalone modal controller for displaying paginated lists.
    MonthlyReport
    JPA entity that persists a pre-computed monthly listening summary for one user.
    MonthlyReportData
    Display record holding the pre-formatted data for a single monthly report card.
    MonthlyReportRepository
    Spring Data JPA repository for MonthlyReport entities.
    MonthlyReportService
    Generates and persists monthly listening reports for the current user.
    MonthlyReportViewModel
    Loads monthly report data asynchronously for a given year and month.
    MusicDashboardApplication
    Spring Boot application entry point.
    MusicPlayerService
    Time Complexity: O(1) for all operations Space Complexity: O(n) where n = queue size
    MyLibraryController
    Top-level controller for the My Library page.
    PlaybackConstants
    Centralized constants for playback tracking and validation.
    PlaybackHistory
    JPA entity recording a single playback event.
    PlaybackHistoryRepository
    Spring Data JPA repository for PlaybackHistory entities.
    PlaybackPanelController
    Controller responsible for building and managing the playback panel UI.
    PlaybackTrackingService
    Time Complexity: O(1) for all operations Space Complexity: O(1)
    PlayerConfig
    Configuration for player panel sizing.
    PlayerConfig.PlayerSize
    Defines the two supported rendering sizes for the playback panel.
    Playlist
    JPA entity representing a user-created playlist.
    PlaylistController
    Top-level controller for the Playlist page.
    PlaylistDialogHandler
    Handles all playlist-related dialogs (create, rename, delete).
    PlaylistRepository
    Spring Data JPA repository for Playlist entities.
    PlaylistService
    Time Complexity: Create/delete: O(1) single database operation Add/remove song: O(1) list manipulation in memory Get playlists: O(n) where n = user's playlists Space Complexity: O(n) where n = playlist size (songs in playlist)
    PlaylistViewBuilder
    Builds all JavaFX nodes for the Playlist screen.
    RecentlyPlayedController
    Builds and refreshes the Recently Played panel on the Dashboard.
    ReportDisplayController
    Displays weekly/monthly reports.
    RowConfig
    Configuration for row-based UI components.
    SecurityConfig
    Spring Security configuration.
    SidebarBuilder
    Builds the shared sidebar structure used by DashboardController and AnalyticsController.
    SidebarBuilder.NavEntry
    A single navigation entry in the sidebar.
    SmoothLineChart
    References:
    Song
    JPA entity representing a music track.
    SongCell
    A ListCell that renders a Song as a horizontal row containing an optional 40px album-art thumbnail, the song title, the primary artist name, and an optional context-menu trigger button.
    SongEditDialog
    A modal dialog that allows the user to edit the metadata of a Song.
    SongHandler
    Handles song-level user interactions by presenting a ContextMenu anchored to the triggering UI element.
    SongImportService
    Reads audio metadata from MP3 and M4A files and persists them to the database.
    SongRepository
    Spring Data JPA repository for Song entities.
    SongViewBuilder
    Builds reusable song and album display components, list views, card grids, and album grids, used in the library.
    SortStrategy
    Defines sorting strategies for songs and albums used across the library views.
    StatCardsData
    Display DTO for the five dashboard stat cards.
    StatCardsViewModel
    ViewModel for the dashboard stat cards.
    StatSnapshot
    All stat-card values derived from a single database fetch.
    StyledView
     
    SyncQueueEntry
    JPA entity for the offline action queue.
    SyncQueueRepository
    Spring Data JPA repository for SyncQueueEntry entities.
    TopAlbumRowData
    Display DTO representing a single row in the Top Albums analytics view.
    TopAlbumsViewModel
    Loads paginated top album rows for the Analytics page.
    TopArtistRowData
    Display DTO representing a single row in the Top Artists analytics view.
    TopArtistsController
    Builds and refreshes the Top 5 Artists All-Time panel on the Dashboard.
    TopArtistsViewModel
    ViewModel for artist-related analytics views.
    TopSongRowData
    Display DTO representing a single row in the Top Songs analytics view.
    TopSongsViewModel
    Loads paginated top song rows for the Analytics page.
    UIComponent
    Abstract base class for Spring-managed JavaFX UI components.
    User
    JPA entity representing an application user.
    UserRepository
    Spring Data JPA repository for User entities.
    UserSessionService
    Holds the currently authenticated user for the lifetime of the application.
    WeeklyReport
    JPA entity that persists a pre-computed weekly listening summary for one user.
    WeeklyReportCalendarController
    Calendar controller for selecting weeks in a month.
    WeeklyReportData
    Display record holding the pre-formatted data for a single weekly report card.
    WeeklyReportRepository
    Spring Data JPA repository for WeeklyReport entities.
    WeeklyReportService
    Generates and persists weekly listening reports for the current user.
    WeeklyReportViewModel
    Loads weekly report data asynchronously for a given year and ISO week number.
    YearEndReport
    JPA entity that persists an annual listening summary used by the Wrapped slideshow.
    YearEndReportRepository
    Spring Data JPA repository for YearEndReport entities.
    YearEndReportService
    Generates and persists annual year-end listening reports for the current user.
    YearEndReportViewModel
    ViewModel for the Year-End report view.
    YearEndReportViewModel.WrappedData
    All data needed to render one year's wrapped screen.
    YearWrappedViewController
    Builds the year-end "Wrapped" slideshow for the Analytics page.
